lines.issue: store-name line is garbled with no spaces and wrong glyphs ('Westlsk@VillsgeStore' instead of 'Westlake Village Store'), '@' substituted for 'a'
stray colon after the date ('4/4/2025:') — real receipt has no colon between date and time
item row has no barcode/PLU prefix while the next item row does — inconsistent item-line format within the same column
has a 12-digit barcode prefix that line 7 lacks; <A> tax flag and price not column-aligned with line 7
label has no amount on the right — empty/missing value in the price column
double colon 'Subtotal::' and font is much smaller/lighter than neighboring total lines; amount not aligned to the savings column above
double colon 'tax::', tiny mismatched font weight, extra space in 'Sales  tax'
double colon 'total::', tiny font inconsistent with the rest of the totals block, amount off-column
'MasterCard' rendered in a tiny faint font and the $18.13 amount is far right and misaligned vs the totals column above

lines.text: Scan the QR code to view your order online,
lines.issue: no QR code graphic rendered (real shows a QR block); glyph '1' substituted in 'v1ew'/'onl1ne'

lines.text: Your receipt is also emailed to

lines.issue: 'Questions?Call' run together with no space; trailing 'a' is a truncated 'at'
phone reads '1-300' — should be '1-800'; OCR/glyph digit error

lines.text: Read our return policy at www.amasen.com/freshreturnpolicy
lines.issue: 'amasen.com' misspelled (should be 'amazon.com') — glyph corruption in the URL

lines.text: Please tell us how we did. Take our brief survey at www.amazon.com/freshfeedback
Thank you for shopping at Amazon Fresh!

lines.issue: footer words run together with no spaces ('SoldbyAmazonRetailLLC') and '1' substituted for 'i' in 'Reta1l'

worst_lines: line 2: store name garbled with '@' for 'a' and no spaces
line 9: Pre-savings total label has no amount
line 12-14: double-colons and tiny mismatched font in totals block
line 8: item row has barcode prefix that line 7 lacks (inconsistent format)
line 28: footer text run together with no spaces
summary: The header skeleton and logo read plausibly, but garbled store/footer text, an empty Pre-savings value, double-colon tiny-font totals, inconsistent item-row formatting, and a missing QR graphic make this clearly off vs a real Amazon Fresh receipt.
